meta_desc: Pure superfoods from East Africa. Baobab, Moringa, Ashwagandha, Shatavari. Natural supplements with no chemicals or GMOs.
meta_keywords: superfoods, baobab powder, moringa, ashwagandha, shatavari, nubiotica
modal_contact_sub: We value live communication. Choose a convenient way, and we'll reply within 15 minutes.
hero_sub: We deliver plants in their most preserved form: dried pulp, crushed leaves, and roots. One ingredient per package — exactly what is on the label.
ben_1_text: At a certified facility matching international standards.
ben_2_text: Every batch goes through multiple independent lab tests before packaging.
ben_3_text: We bring raw materials directly from trusted farms and cooperatives in Tanzania, with no hidden middlemen.
trace_desc_1: We take pride in our suppliers! They are small farmer cooperatives in specific regions of Tanzania.
trace_desc_2: Every batch has a clear history: from harvest at the farm to final packaging in Almaty.
trace_desc_3: Nubiotica is the result of a careful partnership with local African communities.
trace_desc_4: Plants are grown using traditional methods — only sun, rain, and human hands, without unnecessary intervention.
trace_batch_info: Batch: 2025 Data is updated automatically after phytosanitary control of each new batch.
phil_text_1: The modern industry has conditioned us to pills. We suggest returning to real food.
phil_text_2: Nubiotica means mono-ingredients from East Africa. Only dried pulp, leaves, or roots. No additives, no fillers, no chemical processing.
phil_item_1_text: Just add a spoonful to water or a smoothie. It easily fits into any routine.
phil_item_2_text: Not a dietary supplement. Your body recognizes it as understandable, absolutely natural food.
phil_item_3_text: You pay for a 100% pure product, not for capsules and fillers.
col_header_desc: Discover pure, natural superfoods for personalized nutrition. Portion-sized packs for daily convenience. Detailed nutritional profiles are in the product descriptions.
col_bao_desc: 100% natural dried baobab fruit pulp from Tanzania. No additives, preservatives, or GMOs. Contains naturally occurring Vitamin C, dietary fiber, potassium, magnesium, and calcium. A great way to diversify your daily diet with a natural product boasting a pleasant citrus-caramel taste.
col_bao_f1: A natural source of Vitamin C and other vitamins and minerals within baobab fruits
col_bao_f2: Contains a significant amount of naturally occurring dietary fiber
col_bao_f3: Features a pleasant citrus-caramel taste — perfectly complements smoothies, yogurts, porridges, drinks, and desserts
col_bao_f4: Convenient for daily use as part of a diverse diet
col_bao_f5: Suitable for those who prefer natural and minimally processed foods
col_bao_f6: Easily integrates into a varied and balanced diet
col_mor_title: Natural Moringa from Moringa oleifera leaves
col_mor_desc: Crushed Moringa tree leaves. One of the most nutritious plant foods on Earth. A more detailed product description is available in the 'About product' section.
col_ashwa_desc: Ground Ashwagandha root (Withania somnifera) — a traditional plant used in Ayurvedic culture. Natural powder with no additives or artificial processing.
col_ashwa_f1: Suitable for evening rituals and calming drinks
col_ashwa_f2: Supplements the diet during highly busy periods
col_ashwa_f3: Supports a feeling of inner balance
col_ashwa_f4: Used in traditional practices for a harmonious lifestyle
col_shata_desc: Ground Shatavari root (Asparagus racemosus) — a plant known in Ayurvedic tradition. Natural root powder without additives or artificial processing.
col_shata_f1: Suitable for inclusion in female wellness rituals
col_shata_f2: Used in traditional practices to maintain inner balance
col_shata_f3: Supplements the diet during periods of high stress
col_shata_f4: Ideal for those who value plant ingredients with a history of use
guide_header_title: Listen to your body. Choose nature.
guide_header_sub: Select a product based on your current state
guide_bao_symp: Feeling heavy after eating. Want more lightness in your diet. Support for varied nutrition.
guide_mor_symp: Hard to wake up without coffee. Want more natural energy. A natural source of plant nutrients.
guide_ashwa_symp: Intense life rhythm. Craving more inner balance. A traditional plant ingredient.
guide_shata_symp: Different life stages. Crucial to maintain female balance. A plant ingredient for self-care.
cs_header_sub: We are preparing to release new natural treasures. Leave a request to be the first to know when sales start.
cs_mondia_desc: A rare root from East Africa. Known in traditional culture as a natural aphrodisiac and the root of vital energy.
cs_ginger_sub: The most aromatic in the world
cs_ginger_desc: Ginger from Zanzibar island. Valued for its high gingerol content and rich spicy taste.
cs_moss_desc: Seaweed from the clear waters of Zanzibar. Valued for its rich mineral profile and use in functional nutrition.
cs_turm_sub: The golden root of superfood cuisine
cs_turm_desc: Turmeric from East Africa. A source of natural curcumin and a rich spicy taste.
cs_tulsi_desc: Leaves of holy basil. Valued for their rich herbal aroma and use in functional drinks.
man_quote: "I wasn't looking for a business in food. I was looking for the connection with the earth that we lost in cities. And I found it."
man_p1: The history of this brand is non-linear. I am an engineer, not a marketer. I spent recent years in geological exploration: landscapes, soils, natural cycles.
man_p2: Since 2023, I lived and worked in Tanzania. Walking hundreds of kilometers across the land, you start seeing the world differently — where man hasn't yet walled himself off from nature with concrete.
man_p3: In East Africa, I saw a culture where plants are not 'dietary supplements' in pretty jars. They are the foundation of life.
man_p4: Local tribes have used baobab and moringa for centuries, not because it's trendy, but because it works. They know when to harvest and how to shade-dry to preserve potency. I realized: modern 'biohacking' is often just an attempt to reinvent what has been known here for millennia.
man_p5: To build a bridge. We take pristine raw materials and knowledge, bringing them into an urban context. No myths. No promises of overnight miracles.
man_li2: If it's just a root — we say so.
man_li3: Direct contact with farmers and cooperatives we've worked with for years.
man_p7: We don't mix 20 additives to hide poor quality. Quality matters more than volume. We don't chase scale at the expense of composition.
man_p8: They are not infinite. We take exactly as much as needed. We work so the earth can keep living. Direct connection. Pure product. Honest name.
faq_q1: What exactly am I buying? +
faq_a1: You are buying pure mono-component superfoods — natural single-ingredient powders (e.g., baobab, moringa, ashwagandha, shatavari). These are dietary supplements grown in ecologically clean regions (Tanzania), free of GMOs, additives, and chemical processing. Each package (100g) contains crushed natural powder. The products enrich your diet with natural vitamins, minerals, and other nutrients. Not a medicine.
faq_q2: What are mono-components and why are they better than blends? +
faq_a2: Mono-components are superfoods made of one pure ingredient without unnecessary additives. They allow you to combine products yourself based on your needs, avoiding unwanted substances. It's an honest approach: you know what you get and can adjust the portion. Unlike blends, our products retain maximum naturalness and the power of nature.
faq_a3: We preserve the product in its natural form. No shells or auxiliary additives — just pure plant raw material. You adjust the amount and format yourself. To get the benefits of one spoonful (5g), you would have to swallow 8–10 capsules.
faq_q4: What do they taste like? +
faq_a4:
The taste is completely natural — no flavorings or sweeteners.
• Baobab: mild sweet and sour, with light citrus notes.
• Moringa: fresh, herbal, reminiscent of young greens.
• Roots (Ashwagandha / Shatavari): rich, slightly spicy and earthy.
To make the taste milder: add to smoothies, porridge, yogurt, or mix with plant milk and fruits.
faq_q5: How to use superfoods in a daily diet? +
faq_a5: Add 1 tsp to smoothies, yogurts, teas, salads, or baked goods. For example: moringa in a green smoothie for energy, baobab in porridge for freshness. Experiment with recipes on our site — it's a simple way to enrich your nutrition with natural substances.
faq_q6: Can I combine the products? +
faq_a6: Yes, our mono-components are easy to combine for a personalized diet. For instance, morning with moringa + baobab, evening with ashwagandha + shatavari. Start with 1 tsp of each, adding to smoothies, teas, or food. We recommend experimenting gradually to match your life rhythm. Not a medicine.
faq_q7: How do superfoods make you feel? +
faq_a7:
These are foods, not stimulants. Their effect is mild and depends on regular consumption and overall diet.
• Moringa — often chosen to support daily vitality.
• Baobab — valued for a sense of lightness and diverse taste.
• Ashwagandha and Shatavari — traditionally used to support inner balance.
Results are individual and depend on lifestyle and nutrition.
faq_q8: How to choose the right product? +
faq_a8: Focus on your preferences: baobab for diet freshness, moringa for green energy, ashwagandha for calm, shatavari for harmony. Use our wellness guide on the site or write to our chat — we'll help you choose.
faq_q9: Where do the raw materials come from and how do you confirm quality? +
faq_a9: We work only through direct import — no middlemen. Raw materials come from verified regions: Tanzania (baobab, moringa, ashwagandha, shatavari). Every batch undergoes double quality control: thorough testing in Tanzania and secondary control upon entering Kazakhstan. All our products have valid EAEU declarations of conformity. The same raw materials are exported to Japan, the US, and Europe — where quality requirements are among the strictest in the world.
faq_a10: Yes, all products are certified according to Customs Union standards and the laws of the Republic of Kazakhstan. They are natural, free of artificial additives, GMOs, and pesticides. However, like any dietary supplement, they are not intended to treat or prevent diseases.
faq_q11: Are there any contraindications or side effects? +
faq_a11: As natural superfoods, our products are generally well tolerated, but individual reactions are possible (e.g., to new tastes or fiber). If you are allergic to plants (e.g., asparagus family for shatavari), avoid them. Do not exceed the recommended dose (1-2 tsp per day). Not a medicine.
faq_q12: Can children, pregnant, or nursing women take your superfoods? +
faq_a12: Our products are intended for an adult diet. During pregnancy, breastfeeding, and childhood, adding new foods to the diet should be discussed with a specialist. Not intended for treatment or prevention.
faq_a13: Yes, all mono-components are 100% plant-based, with no animal ingredients, gluten, lactose, or artificial additives. Suitable for vegans and vegetarians.
faq_q14: How should I store the products? +
faq_a14: Store in a dry, cool place (not above +25°C), away from direct sunlight. Once opened, use within 3-6 months. After opening, tightly close the zip-lock to maintain freshness. Do not expose to moisture.
faq_q15: Where to buy and are there any promotions? +
faq_a15: Products are available on Wildberries and Ozon. Delivery, payment terms, and current promotions depend on the chosen platform. Relevant links are on the site. We are gradually expanding our sales channels - stay tuned for updates.
faq_q16: What if the product doesn't suit me (returns)? +
faq_a16: If the order was placed via a marketplace, returns are handled according to that platform's rules. Please note: food products of proper quality are non-returnable under Kazakhstan law. If you have questions about product quality or packaging, please contact us — we are always open to dialogue.
contact_card_sub: We don't use chatbots. A real person from our team will answer you.
pm_txt_orig_bao: Baobab (Adansonia digitata) grows in East Africa. Our raw materials come from Tanzania — a region with favorable natural conditions and a traditional baobab fruit harvesting culture.
pm_li_comp_bao2: No additives, sugar, flavorings, or preservatives.
pm_li_comp_bao3: The fruits naturally dry inside the hard shell. After harvesting, the pulp is carefully cleaned and crushed into powder without intense heat treatment.
pm_li_use_bao2: Add to water, juice, smoothies, yogurt, or porridge.
pm_li_store1: Store in a dry, cool place at a temperature not exceeding 25°C.
pm_li_prod2: The production facility complies with ISO 9001, HACCP, ISO 22000, GMP standards.
pm_latin_mor: Natural Superfood from the Heart of Africa
pm_txt_intro_mor: Imagine a tree called the 'tree of life' for its incredible nutritional value. Our Moringa is a pure powder from Moringa oleifera leaves, harvested in ecologically clean regions of Tanzania. No additives, no compromises — just the natural power of nature in a convenient 100g package. Add it to your diet and feel how everyday meals transform into a source of inspiration and energy!
pm_txt_special: Moringa is a superfood with a rich natural composition, known for its natural properties. Here's what you get in every serving:
pm_li_mor1: Naturally occurring vitamins: Rich in vitamins A, C, and E, which are naturally present in the leaves.
pm_li_mor2: Naturally occurring minerals: Contains calcium, potassium, and iron — natural elements to enrich your diet.
pm_li_mor3: Plant protein: Ideal for vegans, contains plant protein.
pm_li_mor4: Chlorophyll and antioxidants: Gives a fresh herbal taste and adds a rich green hue to your dishes.
pm_txt_mor_end: It's not just a supplement — it's a way to make your diet more varied and interesting, drawing inspiration from the ingredient's natural origin.
pm_sec_everyday: How to use in daily life
pm_txt_everyday: Integrate Moringa easily and deliciously! Some ideas for inspiration:
pm_li_use_mor1: Green smoothie: Mix 1 tsp of moringa with banana, spinach, and yogurt for a refreshing start to the day.
pm_li_use_mor2: Tea or infusion: Pour boiling water and let it steep — you'll get a natural drink with herbal notes.
pm_li_use_mor3: Salads and soups: Sprinkle the powder for added nutrition and a light aroma.
pm_li_use_mor4: Baking: Add to bread or cookie dough to enrich the taste with beneficial elements.
pm_li_guar1: Certification: The product is grown without chemicals, certified according to Customs Union and RK standards.
pm_li_guar2: Eco-friendly: Sustainable harvesting in Tanzania, supporting local communities.
pm_li_guar3: Convenient packaging: 100 g in an airtight doypack for freshness and ease of use.
pm_txt_ashwa_intro: Pure Ashwagandha root powder from Tanzania is a powerful African superfood in mono-component form. 100% natural Withania somnifera root, grown without chemicals in the sunny regions of Tanzania. No additives, just premium-quality dried and ground root.
pm_li_why_a1: Earthy, deep taste with slight bitterness
pm_li_why_a2: A root rich in natural compounds
pm_li_why_a3: 100 g packaging — easy to carry and dose
pm_sec_10sec: How to add it to your day in 10 seconds:
pm_li_10s_a1: ½–1 tsp in a smoothie or latte
pm_li_10s_a2: Mix with warm milk + honey + cinnamon
pm_li_10s_a3: Add to porridge, yogurt, or energy bars
pm_txt_ritual: A small spoon — and your power ritual is ready.
pm_li_guar_a1: 100% natural, certified under EAEU and RK standards.
pm_disclaimer: Not a medicine. Dietary supplement. Consult a doctor before use. Max 3–5 g per day.
pm_txt_shata_intro: Shatavari is the root of Asparagus racemosus. One of Ayurveda's most respected superfoods. 100% natural powder with no additives. Pure nature in its rawest form. 100 g — lasts a long time.
pm_li_why_s1: A natural source of saponins, flavonoids, and antioxidants
pm_li_why_s2: Contains vitamins A, C, E and minerals — calcium, iron, magnesium
pm_li_why_s3: Plant protein + dietary fiber for diet variety
pm_li_why_s4: Mild herbal, slightly sweet taste — easily fits into your day
pm_li_who_1: Women looking to add natural support to their diet
pm_li_who_2: Those with an active lifestyle seeking natural caffeine-free adaptogens
pm_li_who_3: Vegans and lovers of natural products
pm_li_who_4: Anyone who values balance and inner strength
pm_txt_mix: Mix as you like — the effect comes with regularity.
pm_li_guar_s2: Certified according to EAEU and RK standards
pm_li_guar_s4: No GMOs, no chemicals, no compromises
pm_disclaimer2: Not a medicine. The dietary supplement is not intended to treat or prevent diseases. The product is certified according to the requirements of the Customs Union and the laws of the Republic of Kazakhstan.
policy_content:
1. General Provisions

This Privacy Policy governs the procedure for processing and protecting personal data of Nubiotica.kz users in accordance with the Law of the Republic of Kazakhstan dated May 21, 2013 No. 94-V "On Personal Data and its Protection".

The personal data operator is:
Limited Liability Partnership "TWIGA TRADE"
BIN: 250840024899
Republic of Kazakhstan, Almaty, Almaly district, Bayzakov st., building 223, office 70
E-mail: hello@nubiotica.kz

By filling out forms on the site and clicking the data submission button, the user expresses their unconditional consent to this Policy and the processing of their personal data.

2. Personal Data We Collect

We may collect the following personal data voluntarily provided by the user:

  • Full Name
  • Email address
  • Phone number
  • Messenger nickname (Telegram)

Cookies: Our site may use cookies and web analytics services to collect anonymous data about user behavior on the site (IP address, browser type, time spent on the site). This is necessary to improve the operation of the resource. Users can disable the use of cookies in their browser settings.

3. Purposes of Personal Data Processing

Personal data is used exclusively for the following purposes:

  • Communication with the user and consulting;
  • Processing submitted applications for cooperation or pre-orders;
  • Providing up-to-date information about products;
  • Sending notifications and coupons as part of the referral program.

4. Transfer of Personal Data to Third Parties

Personal data is not transferred to third parties, except in:

  • Cases expressly provided by the current legislation of the Republic of Kazakhstan;
  • Transfers to trusted services providing application processing (for example, CRM systems, mailing services), provided they comply with confidentiality standards.

5. Protection and Storage Conditions

The Operator takes all necessary organizational and technical measures to protect the user's personal data from unlawful or accidental access, destruction, modification, blocking, copying, or distribution. Data is stored on secure servers, accessible only to authorized employees.

Data is stored until the processing purposes are achieved or until the user revokes their consent.

6. User Rights

The user has the full right to:

  • Receive information about their personal data stored by us;
  • Demand their clarification, updating, or complete deletion;
  • Revoke their consent to data processing at any time.

7. Contact Information

For any questions related to the processing, storage, or deletion of personal data, the user can contact us via email: hello@nubiotica.kz.

8. Final Provisions

The Operator has the right to make changes to this Privacy Policy without prior notice to the user. The current version of the document is always available on this page.
storage_content:
1. General Provisions

This document defines the procedure for storing and protecting personal data of Nubiotica.kz users.

The personal data operator is:
Limited Liability Partnership "TWIGA TRADE"
BIN: 250840024899
Republic of Kazakhstan, Almaty, Almaly district, Bayzakov st., building 223, office 70

2. Composition of Processed Data

The Operator processes the following categories of user data provided through forms on the site:

  • Full Name
  • Email address
  • Phone number
  • Telegram messenger nickname

3. Purposes of Data Storage

Collected data is stored and processed strictly to fulfill the following purposes:

  • Processing incoming applications, requests, and inquiries;
  • Communication with users (consulting, technical support);
  • Informing about products, order statuses, or pre-orders.

4. Storage and Protection Conditions

Personal data is stored exclusively in electronic form on secure servers in compliance with the legislation of the Republic of Kazakhstan.

The Operator takes a set of legal, organizational, and technical measures to protect personal data from unauthorized or accidental access, copying, distribution, as well as from other unlawful actions by third parties.

5. Access to Data

Only authorized employees of the Operator, whose job duties require working with such data, have access to users' personal data. Transferring data to third parties is only possible in cases expressly provided by law.

6. Storage Periods

Personal data is stored until the purposes of its processing are achieved, or until the user revokes consent for processing, unless otherwise provided by legislation.

7. Data Deletion

If the processing purposes are achieved or upon a written request from the user (revocation of consent), personal data is subject to immediate destruction (deletion) from the Operator's databases.

8. Contacts for Inquiries

To revoke consent to data processing, as well as for any questions regarding the storage and protection of personal information, users can contact: hello@nubiotica.kz.
terms_content:
1. General Provisions

This User Agreement (hereinafter — the Agreement) establishes the rules for using the Nubiotica.kz site (hereinafter — the Site). By using the Site, submitting forms, or participating in promotions, the User confirms their full agreement with the terms of this Agreement.

The Owner of the Site is LLP "TWIGA TRADE" (BIN: 250840024899, Republic of Kazakhstan, Almaty) (hereinafter — the Owner).

2. Informational Nature of the Site

All information presented on the Site, including product descriptions, properties, and usage recommendations, is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice.

The products presented on the Site are dietary supplements (superfoods) and are not intended to diagnose, treat, or prevent any diseases.

The Site does not directly sell goods. The "Buy" buttons redirect the User to third-party platforms (marketplaces Wildberries, Ozon), which have their own rules for purchasing, payment, and returning goods. The Site Owner is not responsible for any failures in the operation of third-party platforms.

3. Rules for Participation in the Referral Program ("Nubiotica Friends")

The Site may implement the opportunity to participate in the "Share with a friend" promotion (Referral program), under which the User can receive a reward (a coupon or promo code for 2000 ₸) for a recommendation.

Participation in the program is governed by the following rules:

  • Limit: One User has the right to receive a reward only once for themselves and one unique friend. Mass mailing to oneself at different mailboxes is strictly prohibited.
  • Prohibition of abuse: The use of automated scripts, bots, temporary (disposable) email addresses, and other ways of deceiving the system (fraud) is prohibited.
  • Coupon usage conditions: The method, activation periods, and platform for applying the received coupon (promo code) are specified in the email sent to the User. The coupon cannot be exchanged for a cash equivalent.
  • Owner's Rights: The Owner reserves the right to unilaterally cancel sent coupons, block the User's email, and refuse to provide a discount without explanation if abuse or violation of these rules is detected.
  • The Owner has the right to end or change the conditions of the Referral program at any time without prior notice.

4. Intellectual Property

All materials posted on the Site (texts, images, logos, design) are the property of the Owner. Any copying, reproduction, or use of materials without prior written permission is prohibited.

5. Changes to the Agreement Terms

The Site Owner reserves the right to make changes to this Agreement at any time. Changes take effect from the moment they are published on this page.

6. Contact Information

If you have any questions related to the use of the Site or the Referral program, the User can contact us at: hello@nubiotica.kz.
